basic_details.job_title: MGVCL Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Engineer – Electrical) Recruitment 2026 – 183 Vacancies, Apply Online by 02 July
basic_details.short_information: GUVNL (Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited) through its lead company Madhya Gujarat Vij Company Limited (MGVCL) has invited online applications for 183 posts of Vidyut Sahayak (Junior Engineer - Electrical) on behalf of all DISCOMs and GETCO across Gujarat. The online application starts on 12 June 2026 and the last date to apply is 02 July 2026 (up to 18:00 hrs). Eligible B.E./B.Tech. Electrical graduates can apply at www.mgvcl.com. Selection is through a two-tier CBT exam.

application_fee.details: The application fee for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026 is payable online only through Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking. The fee is non-refundable under any circumstances. Bank charges shall be borne by the candidate. | No other mode of payment - Demand Draft, Money Order, Postal Order, or Cheque - is acceptable.

age_limit.details: Category Maximum Age Unreserved (UR) 35 years Reserved (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS/PwD) 40 years Female Candidates +5 years relaxation Person with Disability (PwD) +10 years relaxation Ex-Armed Force Personnel +10 years relaxation Dependent of Retired GUVNL/Subsidiary Employee Up to 40 years Maximum Age Relaxation Cap (any category) 45 years | The age criteria are governed under the Yuva Swavalamban Scheme of the Government of Gujarat. Departmental candidates have no upper age limit applicable.

qualification.details: To apply for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical 2026, candidates must hold a degree in B.E./B.Tech. (Electrical) or B.E. Electrical and Electronics (EEE) through regular mode. The degree must be from a UGC/AICTE-approved university, with no ATKT in the final year or last two semesters and a minimum average of 55% marks in the final year or last two semesters. | B.E. (Electrical) / B.Tech. (Electrical) / B.E. Electrical and Electronics (EEE) - through Regular Mode only. No ATKT (Allowed To Keep Terms) in the last year or last two semesters. Minimum 55% average marks in the last year or last two semesters. Equivalent degrees as notified by UGC/AICTE are also accepted - submission of Equivalence Certificate from the university is mandatory in such cases. Candidates with graded results must submit a university certificate converting grades to percentage (no rounding off permitted). | The age criteria are governed under the Yuva Swavalamban Scheme of the Government of Gujarat. Departmental candidates have no upper age limit applicable. | Knowledge of Computer Operations. Good command over English and Gujarati language.

salary_details.details: Candidates selected as Vidyut Sahayak (JE - Electrical) will receive a fixed remuneration during the contractual period. No other allowances or benefits are admissible except TA/DA reimbursement as per rules. After satisfactory completion of two years, candidates may be considered for regular appointment as Junior Engineer - Electrical.

selection_process: The selection process for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical 2026 consists of two tiers of Computer Based Tests (CBT)
followed by document verification and a pre-employment medical examination. The final merit is based entirely on the marks obtained in the Second Tier exam.
Computer Knowledge (20). Question paper in English and Gujarati (except Gujarati-language questions). Negative marking: 1/4 mark deducted per wrong answer. Qualifying marks: 50+ for UR
45+ for Reserved/EWS/PwD. If held in multiple batches
Candidates qualifying First Tier are eligible for Second Tier. Online CBT - 100 questions
100 marks - Electrical Engineering only. Question paper in English and Gujarati only. Negative marking: 1/4 mark per wrong answer. Minimum qualifying marks: 50+ for UR

45+ for Reserved/EWS/PwD. Final merit list is based on Second Tier marks. Widow female candidates receive 5% grace marks (of secured marks) in Second Tier only; not applicable if remarried. Tie-breaking: elder candidate preferred → alphabetical order of first name.
Shortlisted candidates are called by respective companies based on roster position. Intimation sent to registered email only. Candidates must meet physical fitness standards as per company rules.
After provisional answer keys are published for both tiers
candidates may raise objections by paying ₹500/- per question online. If the objection is found valid by subject matter experts

pattern_table.Subject: English
pattern_table.Key Topics: Usage & Vocabulary, Synonyms & Antonyms, Word substitutes, Idioms, Error spotting

pattern_table.Subject: Gujarati
pattern_table.Key Topics: Idioms/proverbs, One-word substitutes, Spelling, Synonyms/Antonyms, Language correctness

pattern_table.Subject: General Knowledge
pattern_table.Key Topics: Current Affairs, Indian Polity, Geography, Modern History, Science & Technology, Economics

exam_pattern.details: The GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026 exam is conducted in two tiers. The First Tier tests general aptitude and language ability, while the Second Tier tests core Electrical Engineering knowledge. Both papers carry 100 marks each, with 1/4 negative marking. | Basics of Electrical Engineering Power System Planning, Design and Engineering Transmission Lines and Sub-Station Power System Protection Electrical Machines DC Battery Systems Earthing Systems AC and DC EHV Transmission Lines and Network Electrical Material SCADA and Smart Grid Technology Capacitor and Reactor, STATCOM, SVC, Reactive Power Management Role of IT Applications in Power Generation, Transmission and Distribution Electrical Safety and Electrical Control Systems Working Principles and Components of Various Power Plants VFD (Variable Frequency Drive) and Motor Control Applications Load Flow Analysis EHV, HV and LV Circuit Breakers AC/DC Motors and Applications; Synchronous Generator Switchgear and Protection of EHV/HV/LV Network (GIS, Hybrid) Distribution HT/LT Line Parameters Non-conventional Energy Sources (Wind, Solar, Biomass) Energy Storage Techniques and Renewable Energy Integration Measurement of Electrical Power Distribution Network Fault Analysis, Protection Schemes and Coordination in Distribution Systems Power Transformer and Distribution Transformer Present Scenario in the Power Sector in India Optical Fiber, PLCC Load/Grid Management

syllabus.details: The GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026 exam is conducted in two tiers. The First Tier tests general aptitude and language ability, while the Second Tier tests core Electrical Engineering knowledge. Both papers carry 100 marks each, with 1/4 negative marking.

physical_eligibility.details: With 183 vacancies across five major Gujarat power utilities and statewide exam centers, this is a moderately competitive engineering recruitment. The two-tier CBT format means candidates need to prepare both general aptitude (Tier 1) and deep Electrical Engineering core subjects (Tier 2). The First Tier qualifying cutoff is 50/100 for UR candidates, which is achievable with focused preparation. Tier 2 is the deciding factor - with 30+ Electrical Engineering topics on the syllabus, consistent subject-wise preparation starting with Power Systems, Electrical Machines, and Distribution Networks is advisable. Negative marking of 0.25 per wrong answer applies in both tiers, making accuracy more important than speed.

how_to_apply: The application process for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical 2026 is entirely online. Candidates must apply through the official MGVCL website www.mgvcl.com between 12 June 2026 and 02 July 2026. Before applying, candidates must indicate their order of preference for the five companies (MGVCL, DGVCL, UGVCL, PGVCL, GETCO) - once submitted, the preference is final and cannot be changed.
Find the recruitment notification link for Vidyut Sahayak (JE - Electrical) 2026.
Register online by generating an application number.
Fill in personal, educational, and category details carefully.
Indicate your order of preference for companies (MGVCL, DGVCL, UGVCL, PGVCL, GETCO) in ascending order of choice - this preference is final and irrevocable.
Upload the required documents/photographs as instructed.
Pay the application fee online (Credit Card / Debit Card / Net Banking).
Submit the form and save/print the confirmation for records.
Download your Hall Ticket from https://mgvcl.com when issued.
important_instructions: This recruitment has a unique centralized posting mechanism that candidates must understand before applying. Once posted in a company, inter-company transfer is generally not allowed. Candidates will be allotted a company based on merit, roster, and their stated preference order.

Candidates must indicate preference order for MGVCL, DGVCL, UGVCL, PGVCL, and GETCO at the time of application - this cannot be revised later. Allotment is based on merit rank, roster position, and stated preference. No transfer from one company to another is permitted after appointment - except one additional opportunity during the one-year validity of the result. If a candidate opts for a new company, resignation from the current posting is mandatory; appointment in the new company is treated as a fresh appointment. Minimum 85% of selections will be from local Gujarat State residents. Domicile Certificate of Gujarat is required for this quota. Non-domicile candidates from reserved categories are treated as UR.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 02 July 2026 up to 18:00 hrs. Applications must be submitted through www.mgvcl.com.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 183 vacancies across MGVCL (22), DGVCL (27), UGVCL (26), PGVCL (86), and GETCO (22). Additional vacancies may arise within one year from the date of publication of the Second Tier result.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.E. (Electrical) / B.Tech. (Electrical) / B.E. Electrical and Electronics (EEE) degree through regular mode from a UGC/AICTE-approved university, with no ATKT in the final year or last two semesters and a minimum of 55% average marks in the final year or last two semesters.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 35 years for Unreserved and 40 years for Reserved categories (including EWS) as on 10 June 2026. Additional relaxations of 5 years for females, 10 years for PwD, and 10 years for Ex-Armed Force personnel are available, with the overall cap at 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. Where can candidates apply for MGVCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can submit their online applications through the official MGVCL career portal at www.mgvcl.com/career.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹500/- (inclusive of GST) for Unreserved candidates and ₹250/- (inclusive of GST) for Reserved/PwD candidates. Payment is online only; the fee is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical?
faq.answer: The fixed remuneration is ₹48,100/- per month in the first year and ₹50,700/- per month in the second year. On successful completion of the 2-year contractual period, candidates may be appointed as regular Junior Engineer – Electrical in the pay scale of ₹45,400–1,01,200/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a two-tier Computer Based Test (CBT). Tier 1 covers general aptitude subjects (100 marks). Tier 2 covers Electrical Engineering (100 marks). The final merit is based on Tier 2 marks. Shortlisted candidates then undergo document verification and pre-employment medical examination.

faq.question: Q9. Is there negative marking in the exam?
faq.answer: Yes. There is a negative marking of 1/4 mark (0.25 marks) deducted for every wrong answer in both the First Tier and Second Tier examinations.

faq.question: Q10. Can I change my company preference after applying?
faq.answer: No. The order of preference for companies (MGVCL, DGVCL, UGVCL, PGVCL, GETCO) once submitted is final and irrevocable. No request for revision, addition, or change will be entertained under any circumstances.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for GUVNL Vidyut Sahayak JE Electrical 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 02 July 2026 up to 18:00 hrs. Applications must be submitted through www.mgvcl.com.
